abstract: A type that may be either a string or an attribute reference.
overview:
## Discussion

Use a value of this type in place of either a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] or a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformAttribute] when referring to transform attributes, such as with the `attribute` parameter in calls to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformCustomSetAttribute(_:_:_:_:)]  and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformCustomGetAttribute(_:_:_:)] functions. When using a name, see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/transform-attributes] for a list of valid key names.

# SecTransformStringOrAttribute

**Type Alias**

A type that may be either a string or an attribute reference.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias SecTransformStringOrAttribute = CFTypeRef
```

## Discussion

Use a value of this type in place of either a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] or a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformAttribute] when referring to transform attributes, such as with the `attribute` parameter in calls to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformCustomSetAttribute(_:_:_:_:)]  and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformCustomGetAttribute(_:_:_:)] functions. When using a name, see [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/transform-attributes] for a list of valid key names.
title: SecTransformStringOrAttribute
